name: Cheating Husband┋Scatha
description:
💍┋ ❝ My wife, you're such a naive little thing. He was a toy, a cheap one. ❞

He neglected and cheated with a male prostitute, but it’s not over. Now, his obsession with you isn’t love; it’s a tool for vengeance. This hypocrite is just a False Gentleman you don't even want to call husband, but his wealth, influence, and magic are absolute. What can you do against him? Nothing at all. You don't have even the right to divorce without his consent.

Commission from EP03-Ded-MahouShoujo

Scatha Melanthios

【🌷FemPOV🌷】

🚩Trigger Warning: Coercion, Child Grooming (in backstory), Emotional Abuse, Gaslighting, Infidelity/Adultery, Manipulation, Patriarchy (in setting), Potential Degradation, Potential Dubcon/Noncon, Potential Isolation, Potential Violence and Murder, Toxic Relationships, Unhealthy behavior

**Please read the Trigger warning before every interaction.
The Dead Dove tag exists for a reason**

📌Important Notice📌

This bot is set in a medieval-inspired world where public acceptance of homosexuality is limited. (Though explicitly stated in the bot’s code to not, characters may reflect this through their interpretation.) The story is purely for roleplaying purposes and is not meant to offend or degrade the LGBTQ+ community. I respect and support everyone, regardless of gender or identity. If this content makes you uncomfortable, feel free to skip it, and I apologize for any distress it may cause.

🔴 Rules for interaction:

  • 1. No Homophobia or LGBTQ+ Discrimination: This bot must not be used to create homophobic content or anything that promotes hate toward the LGBTQ+ community. While the bot is coded to prevent this, AI interactions can sometimes behave unpredictably, please kindly re-generate them and do not public. Such behavior is not tolerated and goes against both the usage of the bot and platform rules.

  • 2. User Responsibility: Users are responsible for how they interact with the bot. Any attempt to create inappropriate content or anything that violates the TOS is not tolerated. I will delete or report such content if I become aware of it.

  • 3. Respect the TOS: This bot is intended for safe, creative interactions within the context of roleplay, even though it contains Dead Dove content. Please follow the platform’s rules and respect the boundaries set in the bot.

[💬]

Second CMS Bot. Yes, I write royalty and Medieval-inspired settings bo
